name: rhai-analyzer
description: Language support for Rhai powered by the rhai-analyzer LSP server.

rhai.server.path.description: Absolute path to the rhai-lsp executable. When empty, the extension tries common local development locations.

rhai.server.transport.description: How VSCode should talk to the Rhai language server. TCP mode connects to an already-running server for local debugging.

rhai.server.tcpAddress.description: TCP address to connect to when `rhai.server.transport` is set to `tcp`.

rhai.server.logLevel.description: Log level passed to rhai-lsp when the extension launches it in stdio mode.

rhai.inlayHints.variables.description: Show inferred type inlay hints for local variables.

rhai.inlayHints.parameters.description: Show inferred type inlay hints for function and closure parameters.

rhai.inlayHints.returnTypes.description: Show inferred return type inlay hints for functions and closures.

rhai.format.maxLineLength.description: Preferred maximum line length used by the Rhai formatter.

rhai.format.trailingCommas.description: Keep trailing commas when the formatter expands arrays, objects, calls, and other delimited lists.

rhai.format.finalNewline.description: Ensure formatted Rhai files end with a trailing newline.

rhai.format.containerLayout.description: Control whether the formatter prefers inline or expanded layouts for arrays, objects, parameters, and arguments.

rhai.format.importSortOrder.description: Control whether contiguous top-level import sections keep source order or are sorted by module path when they can be safely reordered.

rhai.trace.server.description: Trace communication between VSCode and the Rhai language server.

scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run bundle
scripts.package:local: cargo build --release -p rhai-lsp && npm run prepare-server:release && npm run package
